The Swipe Files
of the
Copywriting
SuperSTarS
parris
Lampropoulos

-- 1 of 44 --

The Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars
Parris
LAMPROPOULOS
Bio:
Parris Lampropoulos has written some of the most successful promotions ever mailed, for
clients like Boardroom Inc., Rodale, and Healthy Directions. 	He has also Copy Chiefed and
trained many of the top copywriters working today.
Testimonials:
The best fascination writer since Gene Schwartz!
“When I first met Parris, he had never written long-form copy – a situation we remedied quick-
ly, creating tabloids and magalogs together for Boardroom. Parris quickly became hands-
down the best fascination writer since Gene Schwartz.
“Today, Parris pulls in more than $1 million a year in royalties, creating hot new controls for
Boardroom, Soundview Publications and other clients.”
-- Clayton Makepeace
Copywriter & Publisher, The Total Package
Contact Info:
Parris asked that we not include his contact information, because there’s just no way he can
take on another client right now. He’s got more clients than he can handle as it is!
Now that’s a problem most copywriters would love to have!

-- 2 of 44 --

How to Turn a
$25,000 IRA Into
$500,000 or More

Self-Mailer
by:
Parris A. Lampropoulos
